executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: Live architecture-owned checks are green again; the remaining red is isolated to the marketing owner loop, which still fails independent verification on unhealthy runner/outcome evidence.
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: Keep architecture fail-closed but stop treating it as locally broken; the next real fix is inside the marketing owner bundle until fresh marketing independent pass exists.

audit_metadata.scheduler_inspection_method: direct openclaw cron list --json plus jobs.json comparison with explicit live-vs-persisted separation

owns: bounded timeout reruns and verifier refreshes
syncing research artifacts into the git repo

findings.title: Marketing owner loop is the only remaining live red domain
findings.mechanism: marketing_loop_independent_verification.json still fails while the runner bundle is unhealthy, momentum remains needs_attention, and the workflow audit still reports needs_repair around flat primary-repo adoption.
findings.root_cause: The marketing owner loop has fresh evidence, but that evidence still says the current distribution/outcome state is not healthy enough for independent pass.
findings.recommended_fix: Keep the loop red, repair the unhealthy marketing runner/outcome path, and require fresh marketing independent pass before any green system claim.

findings.title: Architecture verifier repair is now live and independently holding
findings.mechanism: agent_architecture_independent_verification.json is qualified_pass and agent_architecture_verifier_latest.md now shows independently verified pass because only external marketing blockers remain.
findings.root_cause: The architecture verifier now separates architecture-owned failures from external owner-domain blockers and checks freshness against newer runtime evidence.
findings.recommended_fix: Preserve the current fail-closed verifier behavior; do not downgrade external marketing red into a fake architecture green.

findings.title: Docs signoff has recovered and is stable enough to stop blocking architecture
findings.mechanism: ralph_verifier_latest.json is pass and the independent architecture verifier records five consecutive passes since the last docs failure window.
findings.root_cause: The docs loop has exited its earlier lock/red condition and no longer contributes live architecture-owned errors.
findings.recommended_fix: No new repair here; just keep requiring independent docs pass and stability checks.

findings.title: Persisted disabled cron history remains separate from live topology
findings.mechanism: jobs.json still contains disabled historical entries while the live Gateway scheduler reports 20 enabled jobs and 0 disabled jobs.
findings.root_cause: Persisted history and live scheduler state are separate surfaces.
findings.recommended_fix: Continue reporting persisted disabled history separately from the live scheduler topology.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Repair the unhealthy marketing runner/outcome path and get a fresh marketing independent pass artifact
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: That is the only remaining live red domain.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Architecture can move from externally blocked high-risk to healthy-with-repairs once the external owner loop clears.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Rerun architecture independent verification after the next material marketing evidence change
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Architecture is already locally sound, so the next meaningful signoff change depends on marketing state.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Architecture signoff will reflect live owner-loop reality without stale evidence skew.

repairs_applied_this_run.change: Reran loop_integrity_audit.py so live ownership/topology evidence is current before architecture signoff.
Reran health_monitor.py; architecture verifier/runtime issues cleared and only marketing-owned red remains in the fresh health artifact.
Fresh independent verification now returns qualified_pass and the verifier artifact reports independently verified pass with external blockers isolated to marketing.

independent_verification.summary: Independent verification confirms the repaired architecture verifier now fails closed on stale signoff, the live loop topology/ownership checks remain green, and shared market-intelligence reuse stays machine-verifiable.

what_still_needs_independent_verificatio: Fresh healthy marketing independent signoff after the runner bundle is healthy and the primary-repo outcome blockers clear.

highest_risk_unresolved_issue.title: Marketing remains independently red on fresh evidence
highest_risk_unresolved_issue.why: Architecture-owned checks are green again, but the system still cannot claim healthy overall behavior while the marketing owner loop fails on unhealthy runner/outcome state.

notes: Loop integrity still reports autonomous-marketing-stack status=error because the marketing loop remains independently red; that is consistent with the current localized blocker set.
Verifier green here means architecture verification passed with qualified external blockers, not that the whole product stack is globally healthy.
